questions.question: In 2025, which Indian state government announced a legacy policy aimed at ensuring the long-term utilization of sports infrastructure developed for the National Games?

What global events in late 2019 and early 2020 have contributed to a rethinking of globalisation strategies among policymakers?
questions.option_2: Decrease in oil prices and global warming

questions.question: What is the theme of the STREE Summit 2025, as inferred from its description?
questions.option_1: "She Triumphs Through Respect, Equality, and Empowerment"
